title: Black Hole Gravitational Lensing
description: Explore Schwarzschild spacetime with real-time ray tracing and accretion disk physics.

title: Reflection and Refraction
description: Change your incident angle and see the results.

title: Newton's First Law
description: Law of Inertia — objects remain at rest or in uniform motion unless acted upon by a force.

title: Newton's Second Law
description: Force equals mass times acceleration. Visualize how force, mass, and acceleration relate.

title: Newton's Third Law
description: For every action there is an equal and opposite reaction.

title: Momentum and Collisions
description: Explore elastic and inelastic collisions. See momentum conservation in action.

title: Energy Conservation
description: Watch potential energy transform into kinetic energy.

title: Friction Forces
description: Understand static and kinetic friction with different surfaces and inclined planes.

title: Pendulum Motion
description: Simple harmonic motion and energy transfer in a pendulum.

title: Faraday's Law
description: A changing magnetic field induces current in a coil.

title: Newton's Law of Gravitation
description: The fundamental law of gravitational attraction.

title: Resistors in Series and Parallel
description: See how resistors compound in different circuit configurations.

title: Capacitors in Series and Parallel
description: See how capacitors compound in different circuit configurations.
